## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Agent/command prompt
- [ ] Skill/tool integration
- [ ] Docker/Open Design setup
- [ ] Install/uninstall scripts
- [ ] Validation/checks
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] I updated README/docs for any public behavior changes.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, auth files, sessions, logs, private product docs, or local paths.
- [ ] I preserved the distinction between bundled local skills, upstream plugins, and optional user-installed skills.
- [ ] I kept normal free-form requests separate from slash-command orchestration flows.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that deserves extra attention?
